parameters.query: SELECT kill_switch FROM adoff_autopilot.config WHERE id=1 LIMIT 1;

SELECT pq.id, pq.platform, pq.body, pq.priority, pq.scheduled_at, pq.lang, pq.brand, pq.quality_score, pq.retry_count, COALESCE(pq.scheduled_at, NOW()) as eff_time FROM adoff_autopilot.posts_queue pq WHERE pq.status='queued' AND pq.quality_score >= 6 AND (pq.scheduled_at IS NULL OR pq.scheduled_at <= NOW()) ORDER BY pq.priority DESC, pq.scheduled_at ASC LIMIT 20;
SELECT c.id, c.api_endpoint, c.oauth_token_ref, c.rate_limit_per_hour, c.active, c.posting_window, c.platform FROM adoff_autopilot.channels c WHERE c.platform = $1::text AND c.active = true LIMIT 1;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET status='channel_unavailable' WHERE id=$1::bigint;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET scheduled_at = to_timestamp($2::bigint) WHERE id=$1::bigint;
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM adoff_autopilot.social_published WHERE platform = $1::text AND published_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour';
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET scheduled_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '60 minutes' WHERE id=$1::bigint;
SELECT COUNT(*) as fail_count FROM adoff_autopilot.publish_log WHERE platform=$1::text AND success=false AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;
INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.publish_log (post_id, platform, success, error) VALUES ($1::bigint, $2::text, $3::boolean, $4::text);
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.channels SET active=false, circuit_breaker_until = NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour' WHERE platform=$1::text;
INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.social_published (post_id, platform, platform_post_id, brand, lang, published_at) VALUES ($1::bigint, $2::text, $3::text, $4::text, $5::text, NOW()) RETURNING id;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET status='published', published_at=NOW(), retry_count=0 WHERE id=$1::bigint;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET status='failed', retry_count=retry_count+1, error=$2::text WHERE id=$1::bigint AND retry_count < 3;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET scheduled_at = NOW() + (INTERVAL '1 minute' * CASE WHEN retry_count=1 THEN 5 WHEN retry_count=2 THEN 30 ELSE 120 END) WHERE id=$1::bigint AND retry_count < 3;

UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET status='posting', claimed_at=NOW() WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM adoff_autopilot.posts_queue WHERE status='queued' AND scheduled_at<=NOW() AND (quality_score IS NULL OR quality_score>=6) ORDER BY scheduled_at LIMIT 3 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED);

UPDATE adoff_autopilot.posts_queue SET status = CASE WHEN $2::boolean THEN 'posted' ELSE 'failed' END, posted_at = CASE WHEN $2::boolean THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, response_url = $3, error = $4, retry_count = retry_count + CASE WHEN $2::boolean THEN 0 ELSE 1 END WHERE id = $1::bigint RETURNING id, status;

UPDATE adoff_autopilot.accounts SET action_count_24h = action_count_24h + 1, last_action_at = NOW(), cooldown_until = CASE WHEN action_count_24h + 1 >= 5 THEN NOW() + interval '12 hours' ELSE NULL END WHERE id = $1::bigint AND $2::boolean;

SELECT pq.*, (SELECT iq.image_path FROM adoff_autopilot.image_queue iq WHERE iq.job_id=pq.image_job_id AND iq.status='done' LIMIT 1) AS img_file FROM adoff_autopilot.posts_queue pq WHERE pq.status='posting' AND pq.claimed_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '3 min' ORDER BY pq.claimed_at LIMIT 3;
